title: Sliding Window Attention KVCache Size
description: Sliding Window Attention KVCache Size documents how sliding-window attention changes KVCache token-slot requirements for large language model inference. It explains the relationship between full attention, sliding-window attention, layer count, block alignment, and hybrid attention layouts, with vLLM implementation notes as a concrete reference.
